title: Dalian, Liaoning — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dalian, Liaoning: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dalian is a city in Liaoning with a population of 7,450,000. A major port and shipping hub in northeastern China, known for its Russian and Japanese colonial architecture and seaside resorts.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
